formulas.name: Rate of Reaction (r)
formulas.variables: ΔC: Change in concentration, Δt: Change in time
formulas.units: mol L⁻¹ s⁻¹ or M s⁻¹

formulas.name: First Order Rate Equation
formulas.variables: a: initial concentration, A: concentration at time t, k: rate constant, t: time

formulas.name: First Order Rate Equation (Alternative Form)
formulas.variables: a: initial concentration, A: concentration at time t, k: rate constant, t: time

formulas.name: Second Order Rate Equation (for two reactants)
formulas.variables: a: initial concentration, A: concentration at time t, k: rate constant, t: time

formulas.name: Second Order Rate Equation (for one reactant)
formulas.variables: a: initial concentration, A: concentration at time t, k: rate constant, t: time

formulas.name: Rate Constant (k)
formulas.variables: a: initial concentration, b: concentration at time t, t: time

formulas.name: Activation Energy (Ea)
formulas.variables: R: Gas constant, T: Temperature in Kelvin, A and B: rate constants at different temperatures

formulas.name: Arrhenius Equation
formulas.variables: k: rate constant, A: frequency factor, Ea: activation energy, R: gas constant, T: temperature in Kelvin
